Our Craft

Every detail, perfected

Neapolitan Wood Fired DOP Certified

The Slïce Philosophy

We don't make pizza.
We make memories.

Our dough is hand-stretched and slow-proofed for 36 hours. Each pizza sees 90 seconds inside our 485°C oak-fired oven — enough to blister the crust while keeping the crumb cloud-soft inside.

01
Heritage WheatCaputo "00" flour from Naples, milled to our spec
02
San Marzano DOPHand-crushed tomatoes from Campania's volcanic plains
03
Fior di LatteFresh mozzarella pulled daily from our dairy partner

01

Our Method

From dough to done

01 / Milling
Heritage Flour

Caputo "00" flour, stone-milled in Naples and shipped weekly to maintain peak freshness.

02 / Ferment
36hr Cold Proof

Slow fermentation at 4°C develops complex flavor and a perfectly open crumb structure.

03 / Top
DOP Ingredients

Only certified DOP toppings — never frozen, never pre-packaged. Everything pulled or sliced fresh each morning.

04 / Fire
90 Seconds at 485°

Our oak-wood oven hits 485°C. Ninety seconds: blistered, charred, perfectly soft inside.

Ready to taste
the difference?

Reserve your table or order for collection. Fresh every day, fired to order.

Behind the Fire

The People & The Place

Our Space

Head Chef · Naples

Dining Room
The Oven
The Kitchen
The Craft

From Naples,
With Fire.

Est. 1987

It started with a single wood-fired oven in a Naples back-alley, a bag of Caputo flour, and a stubborn belief that pizza should be an experience, not just a meal.

Three generations of the Ricci family have kept the original recipe alive — same 36-hour cold ferment, same San Marzano crush, same 90-second fire. We brought it to India in 2018, and Slïce was born.

1987Nonno Marco opens first oven in Naples
2001Second generation wins Best Neapolitan Pizza, Rome
2018Slïce arrives in Mumbai — first Indian chapter
20245 cities, one fire, one dough, no compromises

"A pizza without soul is just bread with toppings." — Marco Ricci Sr.

Grown with Intent.

Farm to Oven

We don't just buy ingredients — we build relationships with the farmers who grow them. Every tomato has a GPS coordinate, every wheel of mozzarella has a name behind it.

🍅

San Marzano DOP

Hand-crushed same day. Grown in volcanic soil of Campania.

🥛

Fior di Latte

Pulled fresh each morning from our dairy partner 4km away.

🌿

Fresh Basil

Rooftop-grown at our Mumbai kitchen. Added post-oven only.

🫒

Extra Virgin Olive Oil

Cold-pressed from Sicilian groves. Single-origin, traceable.

🌾

Caputo "00" Flour

Stone-milled in Naples, air-freighted weekly to preserve freshness.

🧂

Sicilian Sea Salt

Harvested by hand from ancient salt flats. Zero additives.
